inputs.prompt: Draw character from image2 in the exact pose and camera angle of the mannequin in image1. The character must face the same direction as the mannequin. Full body, whole figure visible, soft even flat lighting, uniform lighting, no shadows on the background

_meta.name: character_sheet_vnccs_ashcaller

deltas_vs_warden.mesh: female lighter build: age 22, gender 0.0, weight 0.45, muscle 0.35, height 0.48, breast 0.55, firmness 0.6; head_size 1.15 unchanged
deltas_vs_warden.apose_mannequins: 6 views re-rendered offline (corrected-units mannequin_lib) WITH eye cues at the embedded set's proven geometry: 640x1536, figure fill 0.30, vertically centered (ground 0.65). v1 fill 0.60 bottom-anchored -> QIE drew mannequin+character composites; v2 walk-cell 512x1024 fill 0.78 -> generator copied the mannequin verbatim. Centered ~30% figure is the only geometry the sheet generator repaints in place.

Full-height image2 vs 30% mannequin is the proven composite trigger (seeds 0/20260713/20260714 all failed).

_meta.facing_law_note: per-view 1-frame tests ran through the REAL generator path (pose_data sliced to one view); the direct-QIE probe is NOT predictive of this stage. Views are list-mapped with the same pipe seed, so a full-sheet run equals 6 independent single-view runs; repairs are single-view reseeds + sprite substitution (per-view seeds recorded here).
